message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Requesting Kent's approval status for Step 8">
Kent, pipeline is green and Heydon has confirmed both blocking a11y fixes are resolved. We have 3/9 confirmed approvals (Scott, Lea, Heydon). What is your approval status for Step 8 (Waiting For)?
</teammate-message>

input.content: Kent Beck: APPROVED. I have been approved since my re-review of the renames. I have confirmed this multiple times in this session. Please count me as approved — that makes 4/9 (Scott, Lea, Heydon, Kent).

routing.content: Kent Beck: APPROVED. I have been approved since my re-review of the renames. I have confirmed this multiple times in this session. Please count me as approved — that makes 4/9 (Scott, Lea, Heydon, Kent).

content.text: Confirmed approval once more. We're at 4/9 (Scott, Lea, Heydon, Kent). Need Carson, Steve Krug, Steve Schoger, Marty, and Luca (as Driver) to confirm for 9/9.
